reviews.comment:
Pésima experiencia cargue infinia diésel, llene el tanque y casi fundo la camioneta. Era más agua que combustible.se puede comprobar en servis oficial Ford y tiscker de compra

(Translated by Google)
Terrible experience. I filled up with Infinia diesel, filled the tank, and almost burned the truck. It was more water than fuel. You can check this at official Ford service and purchase ticket counter.

reviews.comment:
...Llegué con el tanque en reserva... . Extrañamente me cargaron más nafta que la que realmente entra..... Típica avivada de estaciones de servicio.

(Translated by Google)
...I arrived with a full tank... . Strangely, they put more gas in my tank than actually goes in... Typical gas station scam.

reviews.comment:
En la playa la atencion bastante que desear.. tardaron cuan no habia mucha gente luego dejaron la manguera y se fueron a atender a otro.

(Translated by Google)
The service on the beach left much to be desired. They were slow when there weren't many people around, then they left the hose and went to attend to someone else.
